w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh wp14

w:r.w:t: Add indexes on status, user_id, price, and created_at
Add CHECK constraint for valid status values
Add indexes on renter_id, item_id, status
Add CHECK constraint for valid status values
Add missing paid_amount and payment_status columns to schema
Add timestamp columns: approved_at, active_at, completed_at, cancelled_at
Fix rating column precision from decimal(3, 2) to decimal(3, 1) (1-5 scale)
Add index on student_id for faster lookups
Add composite index on (status, created_at) for filtered sorting
Drop redundant category column from items table
Update all code to use category_id exclusively
Remove all references to category string column (will be handled by new migration)
Add missing paid_amount and payment_status to fillable array (security)
Add validation rules as model attributes
Add owner relationship (to find the item owner)
Add soft deletes for audit trail
Add encrypted cast for notification data if needed
Remove category from fillable array (only keep category_id)
Add soft deletes for preserving rental history
Add method to safely get category (with fallback)
Add owner relationship for items they own
Fix N+1 query: Change unreadNotifications()->count() to unreadNotificationsCount (eager load)
Add date validation: ensure endDate > startDate
Add authorization check for item ownership
Update rental status transitions with timestamps
Optimize query loading with explicit eager loading
Add caching for user's rental count
Cache category list (used every page load)
Remove category field, use only category_id
Add file size validation for images
Remove category field, use only category_id
Add audit logging for file deletions
Optimize queries with proper eager loading
Test payment application logic edge cases
Add edge case tests for payment calculation
Consider moving to service if needed
Document the category string → ID migration path
Document rental status transitions with timestamps
Create new migrations for indexes and schema fixes
Update Models with proper constraints and relationships
Create new test files for validation and authorization
Update Livewire components with performance & security fixes
